offer: For HVAC technicians processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of work orders into invoices instead of using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual invoicing leads to delayed payments and cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HVAC technicians
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on invoicing
DM HVAC technicians with a demo video
Participate in community forums for HVAC tools
try_it: Let users try Simple work order entry and Basic invoice generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
